positive: A highly stylized, minimalist graphic design featuring an interlocking celestial pattern within a deep forest scene. The central focus is a pair of geometric, majestic mythical creatures (such as glowing stag antlers and stylized lunar crescent moons) connected by glowing, winding root-like vines. The aesthetic should be hyper-detailed but with clean silhouettes and thick, visible lines, reminiscent of linocut engraving meets vaporwave bioluminescence. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered for apparel print use. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, vibrant teal, glowing lavender, and stark cream white. Use strong negative space, high contrast, and a magical, ethereal glow effect emanating from the flora and celestial elements. Trending on Artstation, graphic novel art style, 8k vector art, silkscreen print.
